narrative:
Precinct Highland (precinct in Muskingum County) has 627 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.9 percentage points.
